race.description: Rich River Party Hire Special Ballot Maiden
race.comment: REGAL GENT (5) appreciated the drop in grade last start and recorded his sixth minor placing from nine starts when runner-up over 1600m at Seymour. On-pacer who has been in the money at both 1400m starts. Great chance to grab a well-deserved win in a very shallow maiden. SAKER FALCON (6) was ridden with more aggression last time out and responded by holding on for third over 1500m at Albury. Very fit after two runs back from a spell and should be prominent for a long way. BANK HEIST (2) is back from a five-month spell and is now in the Vincent Hall stable. Struggled at NSW provincial level last prep but will find this easier. Should adapt well. ALVIN (1) is a 20-start maiden whose form is hard to follow. In the mix if he can repeat his second over 1300m at Swan Hill two starts ago. The other runners offer no appeal.
